title: Create: Resurrect
description: Resurrecting in a new world, you must use your smarts, wits, and a bit of luck to navigate the technologies and magicks in order to navigate the new world
body:
Resurrecting in a new world, you must use your smarts, wits, and a bit of luck to navigate the technologies and magicks in order to navigate the new world.

From Outer Space to the inner Deepest Dark, from the dysfunctional nether to the treacherous overworld, the world has stored away the means to get back to the real world through key ender eyes. But even if one manages to get all the eyes, the ender dragon will require a strong set of armor and good team coordination to have a chance at beating it and getting back once and for all.

- Born into a new world, you get to choose what kind of Origin you want, with over 100 species in all sizes from which to choose
- The Overworld has an overhaul world generation to bring out a brand new world to explore in
- Explore Space and expand the borders beyond the overworld
- Amplified Nether means nowhere in the nether is safe, but it also means a higher chance to recover some nether ores for further expansion
- Bounty boards in Villages lets you do side quests when in between building, expanding, and upgrading your gear and base
- Create machinery with Create to really push development for your base
- New weaponry to tackle the hazards of the new world
- Store your items more efficiently through network piping to help organize the amount of resources gained
- Go even Deeper into the Deep Dark and discover / exploit the world of the Deepest Dark
- For those that want to stay at home, there's additional food and recipes for those that want to dive into RP
- The Journey to the end requires searching for unique Eyes in order to enter the end
- All of which to fight the Ender Dragon who is now the Big Bad Evil Boss with harder cycles and attack patterns.
- And now has Backpacks!
